title: Weighted constant-approximation error decomposes into projection residual plus constant error

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For nonzero total mass, the weighted error from u to any constant c equals the projection residual energy plus the weighted error from the projected constant to c.
assumptions: c is any constant comparison value
informal.expected_conclusion: The weighted error decomposes into residual and projected-constant error terms.

declarations.name: weightedP0Projection2_error_decomposition
declarations.statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_error_decomposition (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 u0 u1 c = weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1 + weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 (weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) c

tasks.input: Translate weighted constant-error decomposition for a two-cell P0 projection into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedP0Projection2_error_decomposition (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 u0 u1 c = weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1 + weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 (weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) c

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding weighted errors and the weighted average.
tasks.target: Unfold weightedConstApproxError2, weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2, and weightedCellAverage2; use field_simp with hsum and ring.
